title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入瑙鲁：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入諾魯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Nauru Utilities Corporation (NUC) interconnection requirements and donor-funded project technical specifications, the ministry responsible for energy and infrastructure approval requirements, Nauru Utilities Corporation (NUC) grid-connection requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards, IEC 63056 second-life battery requirements, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 240/415 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与瑙鲁标准局（NUC）合格评定要求、瑙鲁能源委员会（ministry）审批要求、公共事业公司（NUC）并网要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、IEC 63056二次利用电池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及240/415V 50Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與諾魯標準局（NUC）合格評定要求、諾魯能源委員會（ministry）審批要求、公共事業公司（NUC）併網要求、IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、IEC 63056二次利用電池要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及240/415V 50Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, NUC interconnection determination, ministry project approval, donor-funded project technical approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Nauru Utilities Corporation interconnection requirements and donor-funded project technical specifications, the ministry responsible for energy and infrastructure approval procedures, NUC grid-connection technical specifications, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、NUC合格评定范围裁定、ministry项目审批、NUC并网批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行瑙鲁公用事业公司并网要求和援助项目技术规格、能源和基础设施主管部委审批程序、NUC并网技术规格、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、NUC合格評定範圍裁定、ministry項目審批、NUC併網批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行諾魯公用事業公司併網要求和援助項目技術規格、能源和基礎設施主管部委審批程序、NUC併網技術規格、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: Nauru does not yet have a comprehensive standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation. BESS projects operate under a layered approval regime: Nauru Utilities Corporation (NUC) conformity assessment referencing IEC standards, the ministry responsible for energy and infrastructure project licensing, and Nauru Utilities Corporation (NUC) grid-connection approval. As a SIDS nation with solar-plus-storage and grid-resilience targets — exemplified by the Nauru Solar Power Development Project and related solar-plus-storage projects — Nauru references IEC and NFPA international standards. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to Nauru are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence required by NUC and project specifications — China GB 38031 / GB/T 36276 are not accepted substitutes; (2) IEC 62933 system-level performance and safety requirements referenced in ministry and NUC project approvals; (3) IEC 63056 where refurbished or second-life cells are used; (4) NFPA 855 fire-safety installation compliance required for building and installation approvals; (5) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport documentation mandatory under international dangerous-goods conventions for sea freight via Aiwo; (6) voltage configuration: Nauru grid is 240/415 V 50 Hz while China is 220/380 V 50 Hz — nominal voltage differs and PCS must be configured accordingly; and (7) coastal environmental derating for salt-mist, heat, and humidity conditions. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in NUC, ministry, or donor-funded project review.
answer_first.zh: 瑙鲁尚无全面的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。BESS项目在分层审批制度下运作：瑙鲁标准局（NUC）参照IEC标准开展合格评定、瑙鲁能源委员会（ministry）负责项目许可、公共事业公司（NUC）负责并网审批。作为小岛屿发展中国家（SIDS），瑙鲁推进太阳能加储能和电网韧性目标——以瑙鲁太阳能发展项目及相关太阳能加储能项目为代表——并参照IEC和NFPA国际标准。中国BESS出口瑙鲁的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，NUC和项目规格均有要求——中国GB 38031/GB/T 36276不被接受为替代标准；（2）ministry和NUC项目审批中引用的IEC 62933系统级性能和安全要求；（3）使用翻新或二次利用电芯时的IEC 63056要求；（4）建筑和安装审批所需的NFPA 855消防安全安装合规；（5）通过艾沃港海运所需的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输文件，属国际危险品公约强制要求；（6）电压配置：瑙鲁电网为240/415V 50Hz，而中国为220/380V 50Hz——额定电压不同，储能变流器须相应配置；（7）针对盐雾、高温和高湿沿海环境的降额处理。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是生产基准，但在NUC、ministry或NUC审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 諾魯尚無全面的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。BESS項目在分層審批制度下運作：諾魯標準局（NUC）參照IEC標準開展合格評定、諾魯能源委員會（ministry）負責項目許可、公共事業公司（NUC）負責併網審批。作為小島嶼發展中國家（SIDS），諾魯推進太陽能加儲能和電網韌性目標——以諾魯太陽能發展項目及相關太陽能加儲能項目為代表——並參照IEC和NFPA國際標準。中國BESS出口諾魯的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，NUC和項目規格均有要求——中國GB 38031/GB/T 36276不被接受為替代標準；（2）ministry和NUC項目審批中引用的IEC 62933系統級性能和安全要求；（3）使用翻新或二次利用電芯時的IEC 63056要求；（4）建築和安裝審批所需的NFPA 855消防安全安裝合規；（5）通過艾沃港海運所需的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸文件，屬國際危險品公約強制要求；（6）電壓配置：諾魯電網為240/415V 50Hz，而中國為220/380V 50Hz——額定電壓不同，儲能變流器須相應配置；（7）針對鹽霧、高溫和高濕沿海環境的降額處理。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在NUC、ministry或NUC審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
